description: CRG Direct product database for proposal auto-population. Each product has a proposal_section that maps directly to a ProposalSection in the PDF generator. The admin UI selects products, and the corresponding sections are injected into the proposal JSON.

table_item.description: JA Solar 420W All-Black Mono PERC Panels

proposal_section.heading: About Your Solar Panels
proposal_section.content:
The JA Solar 420W All-Black panels specified in this quote are tier-1 rated modules with industry-leading efficiency of 21.3%. Key features:

- Half-cut cell technology for improved shade tolerance and higher yield
- All-black aesthetic design that blends seamlessly with your roof
- 25-year product warranty and 30-year linear performance guarantee
- Rated for wind loads up to 2400Pa and snow loads up to 5400Pa
- Anti-PID (Potential Induced Degradation) certified

These panels are manufactured by JA Solar, one of the world's largest and most trusted solar manufacturers, with over 100GW shipped globally.

proposal_section.heading: About Your Solar Panels
proposal_section.content:
The LONGi Hi-MO 6 425W All-Black panels are premium tier-1 modules featuring the latest HPDC cell technology with 22.0% efficiency. Key features:

- HPDC (High-Performance Direct Connection) cell technology for maximum output
- All-black frameless-look design for a sleek roof appearance
- 25-year product warranty and 30-year performance guarantee (minimum 87.4% output at year 30)
- Enhanced low-light performance for better generation on cloudy days
- IP68 rated junction box for superior weather resistance

LONGi is the world's largest solar panel manufacturer with an AA bankability rating from BloombergNEF, ensuring long-term warranty support.

proposal_section.heading: About Your Solar Panels
proposal_section.content:
The Canadian Solar HiKu7 440W panels offer excellent value with high power output using N-type TOPCon cell technology. Key features:

- N-type TOPCon cells with 22.3% efficiency for maximum generation per panel
- Excellent temperature coefficient (-0.29%/°C) for better summer performance
- 25-year product warranty and 30-year linear power output warranty
- Multi-busbar design for improved reliability and shade tolerance
- Bifacial technology capable of harvesting light from both sides

Canadian Solar has been a global top-5 manufacturer for over 20 years with installations in 180+ countries.

proposal_section.heading: About Your Battery Storage
proposal_section.content:
The GivEnergy 5.2kWh All-in-One system combines a hybrid inverter and battery in a single compact unit. This is what makes a real difference to your energy bills:

- Store excess solar generation during the day for use in the evening peak hours
- Intelligent time-of-use tariff support — charge overnight at cheap rates, use during expensive peak periods
- Emergency Power Supply (EPS) — keeps essential circuits running during power cuts
- Remote monitoring and control via the GivEnergy app on your phone
- Expandable — add a second battery later to increase storage to 10.4kWh

Based on typical usage, the battery increases your self-consumption rate from approximately 35% to 75%, meaning you use far more of the energy your panels generate rather than exporting it.

proposal_section.heading: About Your Battery Storage
proposal_section.content:
The GivEnergy 9.5kWh battery system provides substantial storage capacity for larger homes or higher energy usage. Key benefits:

- 9.5kWh usable capacity — enough to power an average home through the entire evening peak
- Charge from solar during the day and discharge in the evening when electricity is most expensive
- Intelligent time-of-use tariff integration — automatically charge at cheapest overnight rates
- Emergency Power Supply (EPS) keeps lights and essentials running during power cuts
- Stack up to 3 batteries for 28.5kWh total capacity
- 12-year warranty, designed for 6,000+ full charge cycles
- Monitor generation, storage and consumption in real-time via the GivEnergy app

With a 9.5kWh battery, you can typically achieve 80-85% self-consumption, dramatically reducing grid imports and maximising the return on your solar investment.

proposal_section.heading: About Your Battery Storage
proposal_section.content:
The Tesla Powerwall 3 is a premium all-in-one energy storage system with an integrated solar inverter and 13.5kWh of usable capacity. Key features:

- 13.5kWh usable storage — enough to power most homes overnight and through the morning
- Integrated 11.5kW solar inverter eliminates the need for a separate inverter
- Storm Watch — automatically charges to full when severe weather is forecast
- Seamless whole-home backup during power outages (no manual switching)
- Tesla app provides real-time energy flow monitoring and remote control
- Time-Based Control mode automatically optimises for your electricity tariff
- Stackable up to 4 units for 54kWh total capacity

The Powerwall 3 is designed for 10+ years of daily cycling with a 10-year warranty. Tesla's over-the-air updates mean your system improves over time with new features and optimisations.

proposal_section.heading: About Your Inverter
proposal_section.content:
The SolarEdge HD-Wave SE5000H is a 5kW string inverter with panel-level power optimisation. It converts the DC electricity generated by your solar panels into AC electricity for your home. Key features:

- HD-Wave technology — 99% weighted efficiency, the highest in its class
- Panel-level power optimisers maximise output even with partial shading
- Built-in monitoring — track each individual panel's performance via the mySolarEdge app
- 12-year standard warranty (extendable to 20 or 25 years)
- Compact, lightweight design for easy wall mounting
- Arc fault detection (AFCI) for enhanced safety

SolarEdge's optimiser-based system means that shade on one panel does not reduce output from the rest of the array, which is particularly beneficial for roofs with chimneys, aerials, or nearby trees.

proposal_section.heading: About Your Inverter
proposal_section.content:
The GivEnergy 5kW Hybrid Inverter manages both your solar panels and battery storage through a single unit. Key features:

- Hybrid design handles solar generation and battery charge/discharge in one device
- 97.8% peak efficiency for minimal energy losses
- Compatible with all GivEnergy batteries (5.2kWh to 28.5kWh configurations)
- Built-in EPS (Emergency Power Supply) port for backup power during outages
- WiFi and Ethernet connectivity for remote monitoring via the GivEnergy portal
- 12-year manufacturer warranty
- Time-of-use tariff programming for automated cost savings

The hybrid inverter is the brain of your system — it intelligently decides when to use solar directly, when to charge the battery, and when to export surplus to the grid for maximum financial benefit.

table_item.description: Daikin Altherma 3 Air Source Heat Pump (8kW)

proposal_section.heading: About Your Air Source Heat Pump
proposal_section.content:
The Daikin Altherma 3 is a high-efficiency air source heat pump that provides both heating and hot water for your home. It extracts heat energy from the outside air — even at temperatures as low as -25°C — and uses it to heat your home and domestic hot water. Key features:

- SCOP of 4.6 (A7/W35) — for every 1kW of electricity used, it produces 4.6kW of heat
- Operating range from -25°C to +35°C outdoor temperature
- Quiet operation at just 37dB(A) in low-noise mode (quieter than a library)
- R-32 refrigerant with low Global Warming Potential (GWP of 675)
- Built-in weather compensation for automatic efficiency optimisation
- Compatible with existing radiators (may need upsizing some radiators)
- Qualifies for the Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS) grant of £7,500

Daikin is the world's leading heat pump manufacturer with over 100 years of HVAC experience. The Altherma 3 is their flagship residential model, designed specifically for the UK climate.

table_item.description: Mitsubishi Ecodan Air Source Heat Pump (8.5kW)

proposal_section.heading: About Your Air Source Heat Pump
proposal_section.content:
The Mitsubishi Ecodan is the UK's best-selling air source heat pump, with over 300,000 units installed nationwide. It provides efficient heating and hot water by extracting heat energy from the outside air. Key features:

- SCOP of 4.3 (A7/W35) — generates over 4 units of heat for every 1 unit of electricity
- Proven reliability with the lowest failure rate of any heat pump brand in UK field data
- Operating range from -25°C to +35°C
- Ultra-quiet operation with Night Mode reducing sound to just 35dB(A)
- MELCloud app for remote monitoring, scheduling and control from your phone
- Weather compensation adjusts output automatically for maximum efficiency
- Qualifies for the Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS) grant of £7,500

Mitsubishi Electric offer a 5-year manufacturer warranty with optional extension to 7 years. The Ecodan range is designed and tested specifically for UK homes and has a proven track record across thousands of installations.

table_item.description: Vaillant aroTHERM plus Air Source Heat Pump (7kW)

proposal_section.heading: About Your Air Source Heat Pump
proposal_section.content:
The Vaillant aroTHERM plus is a premium air source heat pump using natural R-290 (propane) refrigerant for the lowest possible environmental impact. Key features:

- Natural R-290 refrigerant with a GWP of just 3 (vs 675 for R-32 systems) — future-proof against refrigerant regulations
- SCOP of 4.8 (A7/W35) — one of the highest efficiencies available
- Flow temperatures up to 75°C without backup heating — compatible with existing radiators without changes
- Whisper-quiet operation at just 34dB(A) at 3 metres
- sensoNET connectivity for remote control via the myVAILLANT app
- 7-year manufacturer warranty as standard
- Qualifies for the Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS) grant of £7,500

Vaillant has been manufacturing heating systems since 1874. The aroTHERM plus represents the cutting edge of heat pump technology and is the preferred choice for environmentally conscious homeowners.

table_item.description: myenergi zappi V2 EV Charger (7kW, tethered)

proposal_section.heading: About Your EV Charger
proposal_section.content:
The myenergi zappi V2 is a smart EV charger specifically designed to work with solar panels. It can divert surplus solar energy to charge your car for free. Key features:

- ECO mode — automatically uses surplus solar energy to charge your EV at zero cost
- ECO+ mode — charges only from solar with no grid import at all
- FAST mode — full 7kW charging when you need a quick charge regardless of solar
- Works with any electric vehicle (Type 2 connector, tethered cable included)
- myenergi app for remote scheduling, monitoring and boost control
- Built-in energy monitoring with CT clamp (included)
- OZEV grant eligible (where applicable)

With solar panels and a zappi, many EV owners find they can charge their car almost entirely from free solar energy during the summer months, with typical savings of £800-£1,200 per year compared to public charging.

table_item.description: Ohme Home Pro EV Charger (7.4kW, tethered)

proposal_section.heading: About Your EV Charger
proposal_section.content:
The Ohme Home Pro is a smart EV charger with intelligent tariff integration that automatically charges your car at the cheapest electricity rates. Key features:

- Intelligent tariff integration — connects directly to Octopus, OVO and other smart tariffs
- Automatically schedules charging during cheapest half-hour slots
- 7.4kW charging speed for a full overnight charge
- Solar-aware charging when paired with compatible inverters
- Compact, sleek design with LED status indicator
- Ohme app for remote control, scheduling and charge history
- OZEV grant eligible (where applicable)

Ohme users on Octopus Intelligent Go typically pay around 7p/kWh for overnight EV charging, equivalent to about 1.5p per mile — compared to 8-10p per mile at public chargers.

proposal_section.heading: Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS) Grant
proposal_section.content:
Your installation qualifies for the government's Boiler Upgrade Scheme, which provides a grant of £7,500 towards the cost of an air source heat pump. Key details:

- £7,500 grant applied automatically — deducted from your total price
- Available for homes in England and Wales replacing fossil fuel heating
- Your property must have a valid EPC (Energy Performance Certificate)
- CRG Direct handles the entire application process on your behalf
- No upfront cost for the grant amount — we claim directly from Ofgem

The BUS grant is funded until March 2028 but is allocated on a first-come, first-served basis. We recommend proceeding promptly to secure your grant allocation.

proposal_section.heading: Warm Home: Local Grant Scheme
proposal_section.content:
You may qualify for the Warm Home: Local Grant scheme, which can provide up to £15,000 towards energy efficiency improvements including insulation, solar panels, and heat pumps. Key details:

- Grants of up to £15,000 for eligible homeowners
- Covers solar PV, battery storage, heat pumps, insulation and more
- Means-tested — based on household income and property EPC rating
- Can be combined with other measures for a whole-house approach
- CRG Direct is an approved installer under the scheme

Eligibility is assessed by your local authority. We can help you check whether you qualify and guide you through the application process. Properties with an EPC rating of D or below are typically eligible.

proposal_section.heading: Octopus Energy Zero Bills
proposal_section.content:
The Octopus Energy Zero Bills programme bundles solar panels, battery storage, and a heat pump with an energy tariff that aims to reduce your bills to zero. Key details:

- Octopus installs solar, battery and heat pump at no upfront cost to you
- In return, you switch to an Octopus tariff with a fixed monthly payment
- The system is designed so your solar generation offsets your energy usage
- Excess generation is exported and credited to your account
- Smart tariff integration optimises battery charging for lowest cost
- 15-year agreement with full maintenance and monitoring included

CRG Direct is an approved installation partner for the Octopus Zero Bills programme. We handle the full installation while Octopus manages the finance and tariff. This is ideal for homeowners who want to go green without any upfront investment.
